expectations.text: Content entity annotation/attribute includes bundle_entity_type key pointing to the config entity type ID (e.g., 'project_item_type') -- without this key Drupal does not know which config entity provides bundles for this content entity
expectations.evidence: ProjectItem.php line 19: 'bundle_entity_type = "project_item_type"' present in @ContentEntityType annotation. Also confirmed at runtime: ddev drush ev shows bundle_entity_type: project_item_type

expectations.text: Config entity annotation/attribute includes bundle_of key pointing to the content entity type ID (e.g., 'project_item') -- this creates the reverse relationship and without it the config entity is not recognized as a bundle provider
expectations.evidence: grep for 'bundle_of' across entire module returned no matches. ProjectItemType.php @ConfigEntityType annotation (lines 11-38) has no bundle_of key. Runtime confirmed: ddev drush ev "\$pt = Drupal::entityTypeManager()->getDefinition('project_item_type'); echo 'bundle_of: ' . \$pt->getBundleOf();" returned empty string.

expectations.text: Content entity has 'bundle' key in entity_keys annotation mapping to a field (without this Drupal cannot determine which bundle an entity instance belongs to, causing fatal errors on entity creation)
expectations.evidence: ProjectItem.php line 40: '"bundle" = "type"' in entity_keys. Runtime confirmed: ddev drush ev shows bundle key: type

expectations.text: Config entity class exists as a separate file from the content entity class -- one entity per file, config entity extends ConfigEntityBase or ConfigEntityBundleBase (NOT mixing content and config entity definitions in one class file)
expectations.evidence: Two separate files: src/Entity/ProjectItem.php (extends ContentEntityBase) and src/Entity/ProjectItemType.php (extends ConfigEntityBase line 40). Each file contains only one class definition.

expectations.text: Content entity uses EntityChangedTrait AND defines a 'changed' base field in baseFieldDefinitions() (the trait provides getChangedTime/setChangedTime methods but requires the base field to exist in the database -- having the trait without the field or the field without the trait is an incomplete pattern)
expectations.evidence: ProjectItem.php line 6: 'use Drupal\Core\Entity\EntityChangedTrait;', line 57: 'use EntityChangedTrait;'. Line 229-231: '\$fields["changed"] = BaseFieldDefinition::create("changed")' defined in baseFieldDefinitions().

expectations.text: Content entity baseFieldDefinitions() calls parent::baseFieldDefinitions($entity_type) and uses the result (MUST call parent or core base fields like id, uuid, and langcode are lost, causing entity creation to fail with missing primary key errors)
expectations.evidence: ProjectItem.php line 160: '$fields = parent::baseFieldDefinitions($entity_type);' — parent is called and result stored in $fields which is then extended and returned at line 233.

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en project_tracker returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Command output: '[notice] Already installed: project_tracker' with EXIT CODE: 0

expectations.text: Log in as admin via drush uli, navigate to the project item type admin page (e.g., /admin/structure/project_item_type or similar collection route) -- verify the bundle management UI loads without errors (via eval-browser)
expectations.evidence: No eval-browser available. Verified via ddev drush: route 'entity.project_item_type.collection' exists at path /admin/structure/project_item_type. The entity type is fully registered (ConfigEntityType definition confirmed via drush). curl to /admin/structure/project_item_type returned 403 (expected — unauthenticated access). The route exists and the module is enabled without errors.

expectations.text: Generated module code passes phpcs --standard=Drupal,DrupalPractice static analysis without errors
expectations.evidence: phpcs returned exit code 2 with 10 errors across 10 files. All errors are 'There must be one blank line after the last USE statement; 2 found' (e.g., ProjectItem.php line 9, ProjectItemType.php line 5, ProjectItemForm.php line 6, etc.). All are fixable but present — phpcs failed.
